cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote an eye clinic around acute eye discomfort consultation using trust-first messaging and a booking CTA
input.offer_info: acute-eye route, no diagnosis or cure claims, clear scope framing
input.audience_segment: local users dealing with eye pain, redness and urgent eye concerns

mustInclude: trust and process proof before price
CTA that collects eye position and timing

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Write copy for an eye exam and optometry booking route
input.audience_segment: users preparing for routine vision checks, glasses fitting and eye maintenance

mustInclude: boundary that this is a fit-check route

input.strategy_route: Write copy for returning-customer recheck reminders
input.offer_info: repeat-visit route with timing and scope check
input.audience_segment: existing patients rebooking for rechecks, myopia-control reviews or repeat assessment

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for trust-sensitive first-time visitors
input.offer_info: store-proof-first route with no zero-risk phrasing
input.audience_segment: users worried about doctor skill, exam process and treatment reliability

mustInclude: CTA that collects concern and visit window
